user_story: As a Manager, I want to select a date and view attendance for my direct reports on that day, so that I can review the team's attendance in bulk
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Attendance Mass Approval screen; When I pick a date from the calendar; Then the grid loads attendance records for that date

user_story: As a Manager, I want to filter attendance by department, so that I can focus on employees within a specific department
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Attendance Mass Approval screen; When I select a department and click Search; Then only that department's employees are listed

user_story: As a Manager, I want to reset the filters, so that I can start a new query without leftover criteria
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters; When I click Reset; Then all filters clear and the default view is restored

user_story: As a Manager, I want to see each employee's planned work, actual start/end times, work location, breaks and effective hours in one grid, so that I can validate their attendance before approval
acceptance_criteria: Given the grid is loaded for a date; When records are displayed; Then columns for planned work, actual start time, actual end time, at work, official visit, client location, personal off, WFH, number of breaks, break duration, overall duration and effective hours are shown

user_story: As a Manager, I want to approve attendance for multiple employees at once via the Task column, so that I can process approvals efficiently
acceptance_criteria: Given the attendance grid lists employees for a date; When I act on the Task column for one or more rows; Then their attendance status is updated accordingly

user_story: As a Manager, I want to navigate to the previous date and refresh the view, so that I can review attendance across days quickly
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Attendance Mass Approval screen; When I use Previous date or Refresh; Then the grid reloads for the corresponding date
